ground_truth.title: Hire Movers in Jackson, NJ
ground_truth.main_content:
HireAHelper makes it easy to book affordable move helpers in Jackson. Compare moving companies, get an instant estimate, and book movers online.

With HireAHelper, you can read reviews, compare movers, and research moving costs in Jackson—all in one place. When you hire moving labor through us, we act as your advocate, stepping in if something goes wrong. If your mover cancels, we help you rebook fast. No extra legwork needed.

Table of Contents

The Cost of Hiring Movers in Jackson, NJ
What Is Labor-Only?
Real Reviews of Moving Companies in Jackson, NJ
Resources for Your Move

How Booking With HireAHelper Works

Step 1: You Share Your Details
Give us the key details about your upcoming move—like your move date, home size, and any stairs or heavy items that might require extra help.

Step 2: We Find Your Move Helpers
We instantly match you with the best-value moving companies near you, using proprietary data from over 850,000 HireAHelper moves.

Step 3: You Select Your Movers
Review your moving quote and hire your movers in just a few clicks. And if you need help, you can call or chat with us 7 days a week—before, during, or after your move.

The HireAHelper Moving Advantage

The Traditional Move
Waste hours calling around and filling out forms just to compare prices.
Navigate unreliable customer service and unclear expectations on your own.
Endure spam calls and endless follow-ups from vendors.
Expect to pay out of your own pocket if something goes wrong.

Moving With HireAHelper
Compare confidently. See prices upfront and read verified reviews—no surprises, no games.
Book instantly. Book movers directly online, with no middlemen or unwanted spam.
Get real support. Friendly, helpful humans available 7 days a week.
Backed by our guarantee. Our $1,000 Service Guarantee means peace of mind if things don't go as planned.

The Cost of Moving in Jackson, NJ
In Jackson labor-only moving help typically costs between $339.56 and $739.66.
If you’re tackling a smaller job, like unloading a PODS-style container, moving into a storage unit, or just need help with the heavy lifting, you can hire hourly moving labor for around $86.98 an hour.

HireAHelper’s Best Price Guarantee
Find a lower price for the same move? We’ll match it. You can book with the confidence that you are getting the best value for your move. Learn more.

The Cost of Labor-Only vs. Local-Full Service
Even after factoring in the cost of a rental truck, gas, and supplies, labor-only moving usually costs less than half of what you’d pay for local full-service. Full-service is definitely more convenient—but that convenience comes at a price. For more on the difference between labor-only and local full-service moves, read below.

Comparison Table:
- Labor-Only (Jackson, NJ): $442.75
- Local-Full Service (Jackson, NJ): $1,145.95
- Labor-Only (New Jersey): $450.92
- Local-Full Service (New Jersey): $1,188.29
- Labor-Only (United States): $451.87
- Local-Full Service (United States): $1,167.76

Did you know? More than 1 out of 3 HireAHelper customers use their move helpers to load or unload their PODS container.

Labor-Only Moving Costs by Move Size
As mentioned above, it costs $442.75 on average to hire moving helpers (labor-only) in Jackson, NJ, with an average hourly rate of $86.98. Your final price will depend on how long your move takes.
To get a better sense of what your move might cost, you can see the average cost for different-sized moves in the table below. Learn more about HireAHelper's methodology for calculating average costs based on proprietary data from over 1 million moves.

Cost Table by Home Size:
- 1 Bedroom Apartment: $339.56 (2 movers, 2.2 hours)
- 2 Bedroom Apartment: $390.86 (2 movers, 2.4 hours)
- 3 Bedroom Apartment: $456.16 (2 movers, 2.7 hours)
- 2 Bedroom House: $447.80 (2 movers, 2.6 hours)
- 3 Bedroom House: $521.64 (2 movers, 2.7 hours)
- 4 Bedroom House: $625.82 (3 movers, 3.1 hours)
- 5 Bedroom House: $739.66 (3 movers, 3.9 hours)

What Is Labor-Only?
When most people think of a moving company, they picture a full-service crew that loads, drives, and unloads everything. For in-town moves, this is known as local full-service.
Labor-only moving works differently. You handle the transportation (like a rental truck or PODS container) and we connect you with professional moving contractors to help load or unload your furniture and boxes.
While labor-only requires a bit more work on your end to coordinate all the details, it’s considerably more affordable.

Comparison Table: Full-Service vs. Labor-Only
- Price: Full-Service ($$$), Labor-Only ($)
- Moving Truck: Full-Service (Included), Labor-Only (You Provide)
- Loading Help: Both ✅
- Unloading Help: Both ✅
- Packing: Full-Service (Add-on), Labor-Only (Add-on)

Prefer hands-off? If you’d rather skip the driving and prioritize convenience, you can book a vetted full-service moving company right through HireAHelper.

5,250 Jackson Mover Reviews
On average, movers on HireAHelper earn 4.8 stars out of 5.0 after 322,914 verified customer reviews

Sample Reviews:
1. Mark I from Belle Mead, NJ reviewing Top Shelf Labor Services LLC (5/5)
   Review: Julio and his teammate were polite and respectful. Very knowledgeable on what would fit in the truck. They worked quickly, but there was no damage to any items when we got to our destination
   Cost: $373, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Truck, Service: Loading, Transport Company: U-Haul
   Reviewed on: 10/13/2025

2. Tamara S from Browns Mills, NJ reviewing Asap Movers (5/5)
   Review: Such a wonderful group of guys! They definitely live up to the name ASAP movers! They took good care of our stuff, made good use of the space in our pods, arrived on time, professional, polite, customer service was excellent. They made what could've been a stressful day, a breeze. Highly highly recommend.
   Cost: $1,009, Helpers: 2 / 5hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 10/12/2025

3. Simon A from Beverly, NJ reviewing Lucas Moving & Home Services (5/5)
   Review: Timing was perfect. They knew what had to be done. They moved together as a team and got it all done. My heartfelt appreciation. Communicating and understanding was wonderful and so we operated beautifully like a team. Thank you very much! - Simon.
   Cost: $274, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Unloading
   Reviewed on: 12/10/2025

4. Diane R from Flemington, NJ reviewing Top Shelf Labor Services LLC (5/5)
   Review: My team were hired to load a POD. Julio and Gary worked very hard, in a timely manner and were magicians fitting in all my stuff. Would not hesitate to recommend them.
   Cost: $443, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 9/30/2025

5. Susan W from Princeton, NJ reviewing Sharp Van Lines (5/5)
   Review: They came one hour early (I changed my delivery date and time and they did not get notification of the official change) and I wasn't ready for them, but they gave me a little extra time to make up for it, so that was nice. They did a very good job and all of our stuff arrived safely. Hard workers.
   Cost: $1,123, Helpers: 3 / 5hr, Vehicle: Truck, Service: Movers + Truck
   Reviewed on: 9/25/2025

6. Jj R from Trenton, NJ reviewing Moving Minions (5/5)
   Review: Quick loading with proper setup and stacking of our items! Very professional and friendly! Very pleasant and straightforward! Kept our concerns in mind! 100% recommend! Thank you so much rodney and team!
   Cost: $491, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Truck, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 9/30/2025

7. Debra W from Monroe Township, NJ reviewing Reliable moving and labor (5/5)
   Review: Reliable movers showed up right on time and ready to work. They were very prepared, very respectful of my home and family. If I were ever living in their area again and had to move I would hope they would still be working. Thank you again for a flawless move.????
   Cost: $327, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Truck, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 11/23/2025

8. Mary A from Burlington, NJ reviewing Good To Go Professional Movers (5/5)
   Review: They did a great job. Every thing was so neat. They were meticulous and we have never had a moving this neat. They paid attention to the details and were respectful. They only did what we asked and they go above and beyond. I can go on and on…thank you guys!
   Cost: $323, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: N/A, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 11/25/2025

9. Katherine Z from Howell, NJ reviewing RIGHT BUDGET LABOR SERVICE (5/5)
   Review: Dirk and his crew were absolutely amazing ?? they packed our pod like a jig saw puzzle…everyone was so kind and personable. I would highly recommend them for any of your moving needs ??
   Cost: $447, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
   Reviewed on: 10/23/2025

10. Aaron W from Lumberton, NJ reviewing We Pick Things Up and Put Them Down (5/5)
    Review: Excellent Service! The team from We Pick Things Up and Put Things Down did an outstanding job! They were professional, efficient, and handled everything with great care. They packed my PODs beautifully every item was secured and perfectly organized. I couldn’t have asked for a smoother experience. Highly recommend them for anyone needing reliable and skilled movers!
    Cost: $438, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
    Reviewed on: 10/17/2025

11. Shari S from Staten Island, NY reviewing Always Reliable Moving Specialist (5/5)
    Review: Mel and Nike were exceptional. They were on time. Their kindness and professionalism was outstanding. We are so happy they were here to help us. Highly recommend them.
    Cost: $370, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
    Reviewed on: 11/18/2025

12. Gloria G from Hammonton, NJ reviewing H&M Movers (5/5)
    Review: Arrived on time. Packed my POD perfectly. Hector is a true professional. Never took a break. H&M should be your next hire if moving! You won't be disappointed.
    Cost: $427, Helpers: 2 / 2hr, Vehicle: Container, Service: Loading
    Reviewed on: 10/6/2025
